creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194111
py-python-openstackclient-3.14.2.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates py-python-openstackclient to 3.14.2

Changes by upstream:
- https://docs.openstack.org/releasenotes/python-openstackclient/queens.html

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE
- changed BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPENDS to reflect the new dependencies
- updated WWW
- reformatted pkg-descr

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK


Note:
There's already a newer version at PyPI available but v2.10.0 is the latest supported release for the Queens-Release Series. (see also: https://releases.openstack.org/queens/index.html#queens-python-openstackclient)
Before this port can be committed, following ports must be updated first:
- net/py-python-cinderclient (see PR #228690: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228690)
- net/py-python-glanceclient (see PR #228691: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228691)
- net/py-python-neutronclient (see PR #228701: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228701)
- devel/py-openstacksdk (see PR #228689: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228689)
- devel/py-osc-lib (see PR #228696: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228696)
- devel/py-cliff (see PR #228688: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228688)
